utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09), transportation (flight details with cost €150), accommodation (hotel with name, type, rating, location, cost), activities (three listed with types and costs), additional_services (restaurants listed with details and total dining cost), total_budget (€1080). All details expected under each item are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which has a rating of 7 in the ground-truth data. The transportation is 'Budget airline (airline_option1) from London area, economy class', which corresponds to 'budget_airlines' with 'Economy Class' rated 10. The accommodation is 'property_option4', a 3-star countryside hotel with a 7.8 guest rating and €100 per night, which best matches 'Tranquil Inn' (same nightly cost and guest rating 7.8) rated 7. The activities listed are 'Rock Climbing' (rating 10), 'activity_option32' (not found in ground truth, so omitted or unknown), and 'City Walking Tour' (rating 8). For dining, two restaurants are listed: 'restaurant_option14' (not in ground truth, so omitted or unknown) and 'Le Petit Café', which corresponds to 'French Café' rated 7.
